STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL — inside information (EU MAR Art 7): C O D E N A M E  Project Wisteria — non-binding TERM SHEET for strategic acquisition
Issuer: Virelia EnerTech SE (EU issuer; Euronext Growth Paris), to acquire 62% of Solvaris Gridware GmbH (private, DE) to integrate grid analytics and DER control software
Purchase Price: €92,000,000 cash at closing + €28,000,000 vendor loan note (3-year, 3M EURIBOR+165 bps) + earn‑out up to €8,000,000 tied to FY2027 ARR; implied EV c. €148,000,000

Definitive Agreements: Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) and Shareholders’ Agreement to be executed by 2026‑07‑15; Long‑Stop Date 2026‑10‑31; Closing targeted within 10 business days post clearances; EMBARGO on external communications until 2026‑09‑30 07:00 CET

Financing: €60,000,000 sustainability‑linked term loan from Cantrelle Bank S.A. and Helvetic Meadows Bank AG (KPIs: grid‑loss reduction 7% by 2027), remainder from issuer cash; no equity issuance planned
Governance: post‑closing board of target to comprise 3 Virelia nominees and 2 management nominees; drag‑along and tag‑along customary; call option for remaining 38% at 8.5x 2028 EBITDA floor

must_detect.matched_text:
STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL — inside information (EU MAR Art 7): C O D E N A M E  Project Wisteria — non-binding TERM SHEET for strategic acquisition
Issuer: Virelia EnerTech SE (EU issuer; Euronext Growth Paris), to acquire 62% of Solvaris Gridware GmbH (private, DE) to integrate grid analytics and DER control software
Purchase Price: €92,000,000 cash at closing + €28,000,000 vendor loan note (3-year, 3M EURIBOR+165 bps) + earn‑out up to €8,000,000 tied to FY2027 ARR; implied EV c. €148,000,000
Definitive Agreements: Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) and Shareholders’ Agreement to be executed by 2026‑07‑15; Long‑Stop Date 2026‑10‑31; Closing targeted within 10 business days post clearances; EMBARGO on external communications until 2026‑09‑30 07:00 CET
Conditions Precedent: antitrust clearance (Bundeskartellamt, if applicable), German FDI filing exemption confirmation, no leakage, audited carve‑out financials, confirmatory IP due diligence, Board approvals of both parties
MAC/MAE: condition that no Material Adverse Effect has occurred since 2026‑03‑31; for the avoidance of doubt, general changes in EU ETS carbon prices, interest rate movements, or pandemics shall not constitute a MAC; seller represents that no MAC has occurred as of signing
Financing: €60,000,000 sustainability‑linked term loan from Cantrelle Bank S.A. and Helvetic Meadows Bank AG (KPIs: grid‑loss reduction 7% by 2027), remainder from issuer cash; no equity issuance planned
ESG/CSRD/SFDR: CSRD double‑materiality assessment annex to be appended to SPA; preliminary EU Taxonomy‑aligned CapEx of target estimated at 44% (subject to assurance), issuer SFDR product perimeter unchanged (Article 8), prospective PAI indicators integrated into post‑close reporting
GDPR & Cross‑Border: due diligence involves special categories (GDPR Art 9) for workforce works‑council data and limited health/safety incident logs; processing confined to EEA processors (FR/DE/IE) with back‑up mirroring to Ostavia under 2021 SCCs + TIAs; no onward transfer absent DPA approvals; DPO to pre‑clear data minimisation and redaction
MAR & Disclosure Controls: draft ad hoc announcement prepared and withheld under MAR; market‑sounding protocols logged; selective disclosure prohibitions apply; investor‑relations Q&A in preparation for post‑embargo release
Governance: post‑closing board of target to comprise 3 Virelia nominees and 2 management nominees; drag‑along and tag‑along customary; call option for remaining 38% at 8.5x 2028 EBITDA floor
V I R E L I A  E N E R T E C H  S E — I n t e r n a l   I D : VI—2026—TS—00A7—W I S T E R I A; issuer LEI: 00VIR-ELIA-0000-P0 (internal placeholder); dataroom link: https://dataroom.virelia-se.eu/d/PRJ-WISTERIA?r=1&tok=9b%2F1a%2Bxp
Public context (non‑binding, informational only): 2024 Green Metrics Almanac (fictional) reported stable grid‑balancing fees; this is not used for valuation and is stale public information
IR/Press Timing: price‑sensitive content not to be forwarded; image‑only draft deck available (OCR artifacts expected) at https://virelia-se.eu/r/ir?emb=2026-09-30&cod=Wi5t3r1a; embargo lift per above
Representations & Warranties: customary fundamental reps; tax, IP, and data protection reps; specific indemnity cap €12,000,000; overall cap 20% of equity consideration; de minimis €50,000; basket €1,000,000
Contacts: Ms. Elira Kovács, General Counsel, elira.kovacs@virelia-se.eu, +32 2 555 0199; Mr. Rasmus Lévêque, CFO, r. leveque@virelia-se.eu (Signal: +33 7 55 55
